full_text:
Shao Ti (Yuanbo) 邵悌 (元伯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shao Ti (邵悌), styledYuanbo (元伯). Advisor of Sima Zhao’s. Warned Sima Zhao about trusting Zhong Hui. Shao Ti was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
